positive: Minimalist forest scene silhouette, featuring stylized deer leaping across a tranquil river, surrounded by stylized birch and pine trees. The overall composition should be highly symmetrical and balanced, utilizing strong negative space. The color palette should be restricted to deep navy blue, forest green, and ivory white, designed to look excellent as a single-color screen print on light fabric. The style should evoke a sophisticated, graphic nature aesthetic, similar to Art Nouveau woodcuts, but with clean, modern linework. Dramatic, soft sidelighting emphasizing the clean outlines and crisp contrasts of the silhouette subjects. Perfect central composition for an apparel print, high detail, vector graphic quality.
negative: photorealistic, painting, complex shadows, blur, grunge, noise, watermark, signature, text, logo, artifact, bad anatomy, low detail, extra limbs, disfigured, messy, busy background
